title: Fix a build break on FreeBSD
body:
The build breaks trying to build libcontainer/userns which no longer builds on FreeBSD. Fortunately we only need this for userns.RunningInUserNS so this change moves that call to a linux-only file and adds a stub for FreeBSD.

<!--

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

#### How to verify it

On a FreeBSD system:
```

```

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Sorry about that one - I forgot to do a linux cross build locally :(

Change LGTM
Just need to get some happy tests.
Changed things to use the same stub for both freebsd and darwin.

Second attempt - use the stub for everything except linux.
You need to push again to get [no new tests needed] flag.
